name: Gagaga Escape
name_jp: ガガガの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>脱</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>出</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>劇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When your opponent activates a monster effect while you control a "Gagaga" monster: Negate the activation, then you can discard 1 card, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Gagaga" monster from your Deck. You can banish this card from your GY; change as many "Gagaga" monsters you control as possible to Defense Position, and if you do, "Gagaga" monsters you control cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects this turn. You can only use each effect of "Gagaga Escape" once per turn.
eff: When your opponent activates a monster effect while you control a "Gagaga" monster: Negate the activation, then you can discard 1 card, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Gagaga" monster from your Deck. You can banish this card from your GY; change as many "Gagaga" monsters you control as possible to Defense Position, and if you do, "Gagaga" monsters you control cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects this turn. You can only use each effect of "Gagaga Escape" once per turn.

mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Effect Monster's effect
Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
